content:
准备 定义一个User类
public class User { private String name; private int id; public User(String name, int id) { this.name = name; this.id = id; } public User() { } public String getName() { return name; } public void setName(String name) { this.name = name; } public int getId() { return id; } public void setId(int id) { this.id = id; } @Override public String toString() { return "User{" + "name='" + name + '\'' + ", id=" + id + '}'; } } Class类 获取Class类的三种方法 1、使用Class.forName()方法 Class c1 = Class.forName("life.jinjiang.User"); 2、使用类名.class方法 Class c2 = User.class; 3、使用对象.getClass()方法 User user1 = new User(); Class c3 = user1.getClass();
summary:
准备 定义一个User类
public class User { private String name; private int id; public User(String name, int id) { this.name = name; this.id = id; } public User() { } public String getName() { return name; } public void setName(String name) { this.name = name; } public int getId() { return id; } public void setId(int id) { this.id = id; } @Override public String toString() { return "User{" + "name='" + name + '\'' + ", id=" + id + '}'; } } Class类 获取Class类的三种方法 1、使用Class.
title: Java 反射
